splash.tagline: Perfect Your Form. Powered by AI.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to analyze and perfect your badminton form.
login.mockNote: Demo build — sign-in is not connected to a backend yet.

onboarding.headline: Set Up Your Athlete Profile
onboarding.subheadline: Help Shuttle Coach tailor your analysis to your body and goals.
onboarding.heightTooltip: Used to calculate your ideal swing arc.
onboarding.favoriteProPlaceholder: Choose a pro to compare against
onboarding.primaryGoalsHint: Pick everything you want to work on.
onboarding.giftToast: Welcome! You have received 100 free Credits to try your first analysis.

home.heroSubtext: Upload a clip. Get your AI coaching report in under 60 seconds.

upload.trimInstruction: Select the clip from the moment your opponent hits the shuttle until you finish your swing.
upload.trimTooShort: Clip must be at least 1 second long.
upload.cameraGuide: Film from the side, full body visible.
upload.sampleClipNote: Demo build — a sample clip is pre-loaded for you.
upload.strokeInstruction: Select the stroke type so the AI compares you against the right Pro Player reference.
upload.courtInstruction: Drag the 4 pins to the inner corners of the court. This helps the AI calculate accurate depth and distances.
upload.insufficient: You need 100 Credits. Your balance: {{balance}} Credits. Shortfall: {{shortfall}} Credits.

stroke.SmashDesc: ลูกตบที่ทรงพลังจากเหนือศีรษะ
stroke.Drop_ShotDesc: ลูกหยอดเบา ๆ ลงหน้าเน็ต
stroke.ClearDesc: ลูกโด่งลึกไปท้ายคอร์ต
stroke.DriveDesc: ลูกดาดเร็วขนานพื้น
stroke.Net_KillDesc: ลูกแย็บกดเร็วหน้าเน็ต

processing.headline: Analyzing your form…
processing.tip1: Tip: A powerful smash starts with the backswing, not the swing.
processing.tip2: Tip: Keep your non-racket arm up for balance through contact.
processing.tip3: Tip: Transfer your weight from back foot to front as you swing.
processing.tip4: Tip: Contact the shuttle as high as you comfortably can.
processing.tip5: Tip: Relax your grip until the instant of contact for extra speed.

analysis.firstAnalysisToast: Your first analysis is complete! You're on your way.
analysis.noMistakes: Clean technique — no major mistakes found. Keep it up!

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.paymentMethods: Secure payment via PromptPay · Visa · Mastercard

history.title: Your Analyses
history.deleteBody: This analysis will be permanently removed from your history.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently erases your profile, credits and analysis history. This cannot be undone.

empty.homeSubtext: Upload your first clip and get your AI coaching report.
empty.historySubtext: Every analysis you complete will appear here.
empty.transactionsSubtext: Your credit purchases and analysis deductions will appear here.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.VIDEO_TOO_DARK: Video too dark. Please re-record in better lighting.
error.PLAYER_NOT_DETECTED: We couldn't detect a player in your video. Ensure your full body is visible.
error.VIDEO_TOO_BLURRY: Video is too blurry. Try recording at higher resolution or in better lighting.
error.PROCESSING_TIMEOUT: Analysis is taking longer than expected. We'll notify you when it's ready.
error.NETWORK_ERROR: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
error.UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred. Your Credits are safe.
error.loadFailed: Couldn't load this content. Pull to retry.
error.recordingTips: Film from the side at hip height. Keep your whole body in frame. Use bright, even lighting. Record in 720p or higher. Keep the camera steady.
